params.name: Platinum Record
params.source:
* Expert Scrolls (0.95%), Fragment Crafting (3.9%), Lottery Machine (0.08%), Wishing (0.35%)
* [[Altar#Gods_of_the_Pantheon|God of Fame]] Descent
params.description:
On Jun 6, 1993, this CD that recorded the best dances of the dance king was first released. 

On this day, Michael Jackson performed the moonwalk in his music video for the first time. The move features the performer gliding backward but looking like moving forward, smooth like a devil! After the first performance, fans all over the world became crazy about this dance, which won him the title of Dance king.
